title: Benefits Me
description: Exploring interpersonal relationships and mutual benefit.
lyrics: Sometimes I think about the benefit of you being beneficially connected to me and the blue that I exhibit Girl, can't you see it's what I do? It's not for you, it's for me But I make sure we stand together and solve If I fall, you fall Is it the other way around? Ay, cause, ay What benefits you, it benefits me And that's the way we come to be What benefits you, benefit me In the end, it's all us What benefit do you have if it doesn't benefit me in the long run? Baby, you know what we all need in the growth I'm growing, are you rowing? Damn, the dream of our life is still sowing In trances of me, in trances of you Are we presents to something new? Or is it locked behind the glass of our safe As we can't let go of the things in our past? What do we do to make it last? What benefits you, won't benefit me That's why we hand you a cake in the end And you'll know that we're the same What benefits you, won't benefit me That's why you grow and connect As partners you will find A win-win situation or you're lost in the night I'm just not that sure You need this complication in you I know I like the way your pussy's float away Go up and down when you roll side to side Baby, wiggle and jiggle and diggle in the inside Take away my feelings and my heart And Ted, you divide just to hate But I still like to get in at night You a freak, I can't wait So what benefits you, won't benefit me? This What benefits you, won't benefit me? There's no way you can ever take All the good you did And turn me negative in the end There's only me And you will see What benefits you, won't benefit me I know you think you've won It's past the one you blot me now Cause you can't remember friends inside society You're just lost within You can't have accountability Just sit there lost in travesty Your travesty and I Looks like you can't handle your own pride What benefits you? Well, that's all we can feel in you What benefits you, won't benefit me? And there'll be no reason to Swerve, hurt, hate, swerve, hurt, hate Benefit you, won't benefit me Baby, I'm coming in What will benefit me? Won't benefit you, baby Now we're lost in the breakdown of our hearts Just a little second before I remind you again What benefits you, won't benefit me? In the end, we'll become friends and maybe partners So fuck your love, fuck that habit that makes you run And wanna hurt my soul, crush You're not my number one That's mean, you'll hear it So what I do for me, will have benefits for you What benefits me, will benefit you You'll know it in the end, my friend What benefits me, will benefit you You'll see it in the end, my friend What benefits me, will benefit you You'll know it in the end, my friend What benefits me, will benefit you And you'll see us at the end
